terms.umbrellaPackage: User-facing compatibility distribution that preserves the current install and CLI experience while delegating behavior to core and control-plane artifacts.
terms.corePackage: Apache 2.0 foundational runtime package that carries the reusable execution substrate.
terms.controlPackage: Apache 2.0 operator and management package boundary for higher-level control-plane workflows.
terms.compatibilityShell: Thin package layer that re-exports or dispatches into the new internal artifacts while the migration is in progress.
terms.packageTopology: The path and artifact map that defines which package owns each ecosystem role during the migration.

agentApps.umbrellaCliCompatibility: autoctx may dispatch build commands while the package split is in progress

node.runtime: load local agent handlers through the public agent-runtime contract

cloudflare.runtime: prototype Worker and Durable Object session persistence after Node target contracts stabilize
